purpose: To introduce HubSpot AEO, explain its features and benefits for improving AI visibility, provide pricing details, and encourage users to start a free trial or purchase the product.
summary: This page introduces HubSpot AEO, a tool designed to help businesses track and improve their visibility in AI-generated answers. It showcases features like brand visibility metrics, prompt tracking, and actionable recommendations, aiming to convince users of the necessity and effectiveness of AEO for their marketing strategy. The page details pricing and offers a free trial to drive conversions.
